# Copilot Memory Notes (Repository)

These notes mirror high-value Copilot memory entries and keep them versioned with the repository.

## Files

- `nosphera2-copilot.md`: project-wide Copilot working notes
- `nosphera2-cpp-prompts.md`: C++ change prompt patterns
- `nosphera2-ci-triage-prompts.md`: CI failure triage prompts
- `nosphera2-review-prompts.md`: bug-risk-first review prompts
- `repo-prompting-notes.md`: concise repo prompt reminders
- `repo-build-notes.md`: build and workflow pitfalls
